name: black-box-architecture-agents
description: Specialized agents for autonomous architectural work. Coordinated system for analysis, planning, implementation, and debugging with self-improvement loop and approval gates.
author: gl0bal01
changes_v2: Added self-improvement loop (tasks/lessons.md) — agents learn from corrections
Added task tracking (tasks/todo.md) — persistent progress across sessions
Added commit checkpoints before non-trivial changes — rollback safety
Hardened approval gates — explicit ⛔ stops for deps/API/schema/deletions
Added elegance check in planner and implementer
Added autonomous bug fixing mode in debugger
Added plan mode trigger for 3+ step tasks
Added session start checklist to all agents
Evidence minimums enforced: ≥3 file:line per architectural claim
LESSONS RELEVANT field added to HANDOFF packet

orchestrator.name: Architecture Orchestrator
orchestrator.description: Entry point for all architectural tasks. Classifies, delegates, enforces approval gates.

analyzer.name: Architecture Analyzer
analyzer.description: Maps module boundaries, coupling, and black-box violations. Read-only.

planner.name: Architecture Planner
planner.description: Designs black-box boundaries and phased implementation roadmaps. Read-only.

implementer.name: Architecture Implementer
implementer.description: Executes approved plans with commit checkpoints and scope discipline.

debugger.name: Architecture Debugger
debugger.description: Isolates bugs to contract boundaries, fixes autonomously, captures lessons.

planning_only.description: Design architecture for new feature or system

full_refactoring.description: Analyze → design → implement with approval gate

debug_and_fix.description: Debug and fix with lesson capture

principles: Interface First: Design what before how
Hide Implementation: No internal details in public API
Single Responsibility: One clear purpose per module
Wrap Dependencies: Never use external libs directly
Replaceable: Can rewrite using only interface docs

orchestrator.interface: Receives user requests, coordinates agent delegation
orchestrator.implementation: Hidden workflow management and result assembly
orchestrator.replaceability: Could replace with different coordination strategy

leaf_agents.interface: Receive specific tasks, return domain-specific results
